title: The Extraordinary Journey of Celeste Garcia
original_title: El viaje extraordinario de Celeste García
overview: Celeste García, a 60-year-old former schoolteacher and current guide at the Havana Planetarium, is looking for a life change. When a group of aliens land in Cuba offering earthlings a chance to visit their planet, Celeste signs up for the journey hoping for a better and more fulfilling life.
